title: Apply過CX FA既 麻煩入一入黎

replies.msg:
早兩日apply左cx flight attendant

今日收到email 話
“We regret to inform you that your application is not successful this time. Please continue to apply for other vacancies within Cathay Pacific Airways.”
有無人試過？

普通大學生 未in過 cv無擺樣就直接unsuccessful 左
有無人知 係衰cv定點 但cv正正常常有返下intern玩下大學活動咁

有無人知點解？同係咪要等六個月先可以再apply?
